metadata.name: odoo
metadata.description: Open-source ERP / business application suite — three install modes: native APT, build from source, or container with bundled PostgreSQL

default.description: Native APT package from nightly.odoo.com — systemd service. Requires Ubuntu 24.04+ or Debian 13+ (older LTS lack python3-lxml-html-clean and other dependencies). Older systems: use container or source variant.
installScript: set -e; wget -qO- https://nightly.odoo.com/odoo.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/odoo-archive-keyring.gpg && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/odoo-archive-keyring.gpg] https://nightly.odoo.com/19.0/nightly/deb/ ./' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/odoo.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y odoo
postInstall: echo 'Odoo installed as systemd service — check: systemctl status odoo'
echo 'Config: /etc/odoo/odoo.conf — change admin_passwd before first use'

source.description: Build from source via git + uv venv (Odoo 19.0 branch). Requires Python 3.12+ (uv will pick the system Python — Ubuntu 22.04's 3.10 cannot build pinned gevent; use Ubuntu 24.04+ or provision 3.12 via uv python install).
installScript: set -e; sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git python3-dev python3-pip libxml2-dev libxslt1-dev libldap2-dev libpq-dev libsasl2-dev libjpeg-dev zlib1g-dev node-less npm wkhtmltopdf && git clone --depth 1 --branch 19.0 https://github.com/odoo/odoo.git /opt/odoo && cd /opt/odoo && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
postInstall: echo 'Run: cd /opt/odoo && uv run python3 odoo-bin --addons-path=addons -d <db-name>'
echo 'PostgreSQL must be running and accessible — see: portunix install postgresql'

container.description: Official odoo:19 Docker image with bundled PostgreSQL 16 sidecar. --db-* flags apply to the Odoo primary only; the bundled sidecar's credentials stay odoo/odoo. For custom DB credentials use the container-external-db variant.

container-external-db.description: Official odoo:19 Docker image with user-supplied PostgreSQL — no bundled sidecar; pass --db-host / --db-port / --db-user / --db-password flags to point at your DB

source.description: Build from source via git + uv venv (Odoo 19.0 branch) — user installs system deps via brew. Requires Python 3.12+ (brew install python@3.12 if needed).
installScript: set -e; git clone --depth 1 --branch 19.0 https://github.com/odoo/odoo.git $HOME/odoo && cd $HOME/odoo && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
postInstall: echo 'Install system deps via: brew install postgresql node wkhtmltopdf libxml2 libxslt'
echo 'Run: cd $HOME/odoo && uv run python3 odoo-bin --addons-path=addons -d <db-name>'

container.description: Official odoo:19 Docker image with bundled PostgreSQL 16 sidecar. --db-* flags apply to the Odoo primary only; the bundled sidecar's credentials stay odoo/odoo. For custom DB credentials use the container-external-db variant.

container-external-db.description: Official odoo:19 Docker image with user-supplied PostgreSQL — no bundled sidecar; pass --db-host / --db-port / --db-user / --db-password flags to point at your DB

source.description: Build from source via git + uv venv (Odoo 19.0 branch) — development use only; production on Windows not recommended by Odoo. Requires Python 3.12+.
installScript: git clone --depth 1 --branch 19.0 https://github.com/odoo/odoo.git %USERPROFILE%\odoo && cd /d %USERPROFILE%\odoo && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
postInstall: Write-Host 'PostgreSQL must be installed separately (portunix install postgresql)'
Write-Host 'Run: cd %USERPROFILE%\odoo && uv run python odoo-bin --addons-path=addons -d <db-name>'

container.description: Official odoo:19 Docker image with bundled PostgreSQL 16 sidecar (requires Docker Desktop). --db-* flags apply to the Odoo primary only; the bundled sidecar's credentials stay odoo/odoo. For custom DB credentials use the container-external-db variant.

container-external-db.description: Official odoo:19 Docker image with user-supplied PostgreSQL — no bundled sidecar; pass --db-host / --db-port / --db-user / --db-password flags to point at your DB

features: Full Odoo Community ERP suite (CRM, accounting, inventory, HR, e-commerce, ...)
Three install variants: native APT package, build from source, container
Container variant bundles PostgreSQL 16 sidecar — zero external prerequisites
Shared container network 'portunix-odoo-net' for Odoo + PostgreSQL linking
Extensible: future OCA / Enterprise addon packages layer on top

aiPrompts.versionDiscovery: Odoo has annual major releases with ~3 year support overlap. Current latest stable is 19 (April 2026). Check https://www.odoo.com/documentation/ for release cadence. APT repo at nightly.odoo.com/<major>.0/nightly/deb/, source at github.com/odoo/odoo (branch <major>.0), containers at docker.io/library/odoo:<major>.
aiPrompts.urlResolution: APT: https://nightly.odoo.com/19.0/nightly/deb/ (GPG key: https://nightly.odoo.com/odoo.key). Source: git clone https://github.com/odoo/odoo.git --branch 19.0. Container: docker.io/library/odoo:19.
aiPrompts.updateGuidance: Pick variant by use case — 'default' for production Linux servers (systemd-managed, requires Ubuntu 24.04+ / Debian 13+), 'source' for addon development against Odoo internals (requires Python 3.12+), 'container' for zero-config dev/staging/demos (bundles PostgreSQL 16 sidecar), 'container-external-db' when you already have PostgreSQL running elsewhere (pass --db-host / --db-port / --db-user / --db-password flags). The --db-* flags target the Odoo primary container only; with the bundled 'container' variant they cannot reconfigure the sidecar's POSTGRES_USER/POSTGRES_PASSWORD — use 'container-external-db' for custom credentials. PostgreSQL 13+ is MANDATORY for default/source variants (Odoo has no alternative RDBMS). SECURITY: change admin_passwd from default before first use; enable proxy_mode=True behind reverse proxy; set list_db=False in production. For Windows/macOS prefer a container variant — default (APT) is Linux-only and source on Windows is development-only per Odoo manifest.
